nodes.title: fix: handle zero division edge case in Calculator
nodes.body:
## Summary

This PR adds a guard clause to `Calculator.divide()` to raise a proper `ZeroDivisionError` instead of letting Python's default error propagate. This gives us better error messages in production logs.

## Changes
- Added zero check in `divide()` method
- Added unit tests for the edge case
Looks good! Consider also handling `None` inputs.
LGTM. Nice catch on the edge case.
